name: WeRead MCP Server
what_it_does: WeRead (微信读书) MCP server enabling AI agents to access Tencent's WeRead e-book platform — fetching reading notes and highlights, listing bookshelf contents, retrieving book metadata, accessing reading progress, and integrating WeRead's reading data into agent-driven knowledge management and note-taking workflows.
use_cases: Exporting and summarizing reading notes from WeRead into knowledge bases
Retrieving book highlights for review agents and spaced repetition systems
Building personal reading dashboards from WeRead library data
Syncing WeRead notes with Obsidian or other note-taking tools via agents
Analyzing reading patterns and progress from personal library agents
Integrating Chinese e-book reading data into AI-powered study workflows
not_for: Non-Chinese market users (WeRead is a Chinese-language platform)
Non-reading-data use cases (WeRead is e-books only)
best_when: A Chinese-language reader wants to integrate WeRead notes and highlights into AI-driven knowledge management — particularly valuable for users with large WeRead libraries.
avoid_when: You're outside China, don't have a WeChat/WeRead account, or use Western e-book platforms like Kindle or Kobo.

auth.notes: WeRead cookie-based authentication — requires extracting session cookie from WeRead web session. Unofficial API (WeRead has no public API). Cookie expires periodically and requires refresh.

pricing.free_tier_limits: WeRead: free tier with limited books; VIP subscription for full library
pricing.paid_tiers: WeRead VIP subscription required for full access
pricing.notes: WeRead app is freemium. Community MCP server is free. Unofficial API.

performance.rate_limits: Unofficial WeRead API — no documented rate limits; be conservative

known_agent_gotchas: Unofficial WeRead API — no public documentation; may break without warning
Cookie authentication expires — agents must handle re-auth gracefully
Chinese-language platform — documentation primarily in Chinese
Data residency in China — data subject to Chinese data regulations
WeRead API changes with app updates may break MCP without warning
Rate limiting behavior undocumented — avoid aggressive polling
agent_readiness.security_notes: Cookie auth stored as env var. Unofficial API. China data residency. Community MCP. HTTPS enforced by WeRead servers. Avoid storing cookies in version control.

security_score_components.security_notes: Cookie-based auth. Unofficial API. China data residency. Store cookie securely. Community MCP.
